name: Triage
description_en: Move issues and external PRs through a state machine of triage roles — categorise, verify, grill if needed, and write agent-ready briefs.
description_zh: 用一套分诊角色状态机来流转 issue 和外部 PR——分类、验证、必要时拷问，并写出可交给 agent 的工作简报。
long_en: One skill from Matt Pocock's skills collection (this entry installs only the skills/engineering/triage folder, not the whole repo). It moves incoming issues (and optionally external PRs) through canonical triage roles — categorising bug vs enhancement, assigning states like needs-triage / needs-info / ready-for-agent, verifying the claim by reproducing it, grilling underspecified requests into shape, and posting agent-ready briefs back to the tracker.
long_zh: Matt Pocock 技能合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/engineering/triage 这一个目录，而非整仓）。它把进来的 issue（以及可选的外部 PR）按规范化的分诊角色流转——区分 bug 与增强、打上 needs-triage / needs-info / ready-for-agent 等状态、通过复现来验证主张、把描述不清的请求拷问成形，并把可交给 agent 的简报回贴到追踪器。
sec_note_en: This skill reads from and writes to your issue tracker (GitHub via the gh CLI by default, or GitLab/local-markdown/other), so it needs that tracker's access and will create labels, post comments, and change issue/PR states. It expects setup-matt-pocock-skills to have configured the label vocabulary first. When verifying claims it may check out PR branches and run their tests/commands — review code it executes.
sec_note_zh: 该技能会读写你的 issue 追踪器（默认通过 gh CLI 使用 GitHub，也支持 GitLab/本地 markdown/其他），因此需要该追踪器的访问权限，并会创建标签、发表评论、变更 issue/PR 状态。它要求先用 setup-matt-pocock-skills 配置好标签词表。在验证主张时，它可能检出 PR 分支并运行其测试/命令——请审查它执行的代码。
